title: Deluxe Paws Your Planet Soft Cuddly Eco Plush Toy 15cm (Lamb)
features: ECO FRIENDLY TEDDY BEARS - Your Planet Eco Plush Wildlife Teddy Bears are made from 100% recycled plastic. A prime visual example of how something new can be made from platic waste.
ULTRA SOFT TEDDY BEARS - Perfect cute gifts - Say I love you with an environmentally conscious teddy bear.
FOR THE FUTURE - Teach your kids the importance of caring for the environment with our teddy bears.
MADE OF 100% POST CONSUMER MATERIALS - Reducing the harmful impact of plastic waste on the environment.
9 PLASTIC BOTTLES are used to make enough fibre for our 15cm / 6" / 15cm teddy bears.
